mirModule.title: 💰 MIR Module - Only €8/month (+ VAT)
mirModule.mandatory: Automatic submission of guest forms to the Ministry of Interior is
mirModule.descriptionSuffix: you can activate the MIR module, which includes automatic digital check-in and automatic submission of forms to the government.

videoTutorial.title: Video Tutorial - User Panel
videoTutorial.description: Learn how to use all Delfín Check-in features

errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
errors.connectionError: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
errors.attemptsExhausted: You've exhausted your attempts. Wait before trying again.
errors.retryIn: You can try again in {minutes} minute
errors.retryInPlural: You can try again in {minutes} minutes

step1.title: 🔐 Change Password
step1.intro: For security, you must change your temporary password before continuing.

step2.title: 📋 Company Data
step2.intro: Complete your company or accommodation details. This information will be used for invoices and the public guest form.

step3.title: 🔐 MIR Configuration (Optional)
step3.importantText: To send communications to the Ministry of the Interior, you need to configure your MIR credentials. You obtain these when registering with the MIR Hospitality System (SES-Hospedajes).
step3.reminderText: Automatic submission of guest forms to the Ministry of the Interior is
step3.priceSuffix: you can have the MIR module active, which includes:
step3.feature2: Automatic form submission to the government
step3.feature4: No worries about fines or penalties

step4.title: 🏠 Add Property
step4.intro: Add at least one property or room to start managing your reservations.
step4.optionalForOtherTenants: You can add properties later in Settings. You may continue without adding any now if you prefer.
step4.propertyNamePlaceholder: E.g. Room 1, Sea View Apartment, etc.

step5.title: Cleaning Calendar
step5.intro: Set up cleaning schedules per room. An automatic calendar will be generated for your cleaning staff.
step5.optional: This step is optional. You can configure or change this later in Settings.
step5.noRooms: No rooms configured. You can go back to the previous step to add one.

errors.mustChangePassword: You must change your password before continuing
errors.allFieldsRequired: All fields marked with * are required
errors.passwordsDoNotMatch: The new passwords do not match
errors.passwordMinLength: The new password must be at least 8 characters
errors.mustAddProperty: You must add at least one property before continuing

reservations.searchLabel: Search by name, phone, email, room, Booking, Airbnb...

ical.title: iCal calendar URL
ical.allReservationsDescription: This calendar includes all room information from the dashboard.

instructions.title: How to add to your calendar

ios.title: iPhone/iPad
ios.step5: Paste the calendar URL you copied above.

android.title: Android/Google Calendar
android.step1: Open Google Calendar in the browser.
android.step2: On the left side, look for "Other calendars".
android.step6: The calendar will appear in your mobile app automatically.

syncIssues.title: Reservations not updating?
syncIssues.commonDescription: Mobile calendars can take between 15 minutes and 24 hours to sync automatically. This is normal and depends on the device and app.
syncIssues.solution1: Force sync: pull down to refresh in your calendar app.
syncIssues.solution2: Remove and re-add: delete the subscribed calendar and add it again.
syncIssues.solution3: Use the updated URL: URLs include timestamps to force updates.
syncIssues.solution4: Check your connection: make sure you have an active internet connection.

technical.title: Technical information
technical.item1: Calendars update automatically every time there are changes.
technical.item2: Include full information: guest, phone, price, commissions.
technical.item4: Compatible with all calendars that support iCal/CalDAV.

guest Registrations.title: Form Records
guest Registrations.subtitle: Management and XML generation for Ministry of Interior
guest Registrations.noRegistrationsFiltered: No records for the selected filters
guest Registrations.noRegistrationsDescription: Clients can submit records from the public form
guest Registrations.xmlConjuntoGenerated: Batch XML generated and downloaded successfully
guest Registrations.sendSuccess: Successfully sent to Ministry of Interior
guest Registrations.freePlanBanner: On the free plan, automatic submission to the Ministry of the Interior is not included. Data is saved here and you can download the XML to upload it manually to the Ministry.
guest Registrations.formUrlDescription: Share this link with your guests. It opens the official traveler registration form with your property context; validation errors appear next to each field in the language selected on the form (ES/EN/FR/RU).

errorPage.title: Dashboard Error
errorPage.description: An error occurred while loading the traveler registrations dashboard.

delete.title: Confirm Deletion
delete.messageSingle: Are you sure you want to delete this record?
delete.messageMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {count} records?

instructions.title: How to use your form
instructions.step1Description: Copy and share your form URL with your clients. You can add it to your website, send it via email, or share it on social media.
instructions.step2Description: The form automatically adapts to your property information. Clients will see your establishment name and contact details.
instructions.step3Description: All inquiries will appear on this page. You can see contact details, dates of interest, and messages from your clients.
instructions.step4Description: Use the contact information to respond directly to your clients and convert inquiries into bookings.

infoCards.card1: Records will appear here when clients complete the form
infoCards.card2: You can generate individual or batch XML to send to the Ministry of Interior
infoCards.card3: Use filters to find specific records

guest Registrations.selectOneForXml: Please select at least one record to generate batch XML

estadoEnviosMir.historialSubtitle: Review each communication without leaving the view thanks to the scroll panel.

mirComunicaciones.title: MIR Submissions Status
mirComunicaciones.subtitle: Management of communications with the Ministry of Interior
mirComunicaciones.subtitleDetail: Submission, query and cancellation of official communications
mirComunicaciones.comunicacionesDescription: List of all communications sent to MIR
mirComunicaciones.consultaDescription: Query the status of specific communications in MIR
mirComunicaciones.catalogoDescription: Query MIR master tables (document types, payment types, etc.)
mirComunicaciones.catalogoHint: Available catalogs: TIPOS_DOCUMENTO, TIPOS_PAGO, PAISES, MUNICIPIOS, TIPOS_ESTABLECIMIENTO, ROLES_PERSONA
mirComunicaciones.anulacionDescription: Cancel a full batch of communications in MIR
mirComunicaciones.anulacionWarning: This action will permanently cancel the batch in MIR. This operation cannot be undone.
mirComunicaciones.referenciaHint: If provided, status will be updated in the local database
mirComunicaciones.successLoad: Query completed successfully. Found {total} records ({pendientes} pending, {enviados} sent, {confirmados} confirmed, {errores} errors)
mirComunicaciones.successTiempoReal: Real-time query completed - {lotes} batches queried, {actualizados} updated according to official MIR
mirComunicaciones.successTiempoRealAlert: Real-time query completed. Batches queried: {lotes}. Updated: {actualizados}. Status updated according to official MIR.
mirComunicaciones.errorCodigoRequerido: You must provide at least one communication code
mirComunicaciones.errorLoteRequerido: You must provide the batch code
mirComunicaciones.errorCatalogoRequerido: You must provide the catalog name
mirComunicaciones.noExisteEnSistema: Does not exist in the system

layout.suspendedMessage: Your services have been suspended due to non-payment after {count} failed attempts.
layout.suspendedHint: You can view your data, but you will not be able to create new records, send messages or process reservations until you update your payment method.
layout.paymentFailedMessage: Your subscription payment could not be processed. Attempt {current}/3.
layout.paymentFailedHintOne: If you do not update your payment method, we will automatically retry once more. After 3 failed attempts, services will be suspended.
layout.paymentFailedHintMany: If you do not update your payment method, we will automatically retry {remaining} more times. After 3 failed attempts, services will be suspended.
layout.pendingInvoicesCountOne: You have 1 pending invoice to pay.
layout.pendingInvoicesCountMany: You have {count} pending invoices to pay.

support.title: Software technical support
support.intro: This channel is for serious issues affecting Delfín Check-in (bugs, integrations, system access or other technical blockers). We review each ticket by impact.
support.notFor: Do not use this form for generic commercial questions or end‑guest support; use the usual channels or the general contact email.
support.subjectPlaceholder: Summarise the issue in one clear sentence
support.bodyPlaceholder: What were you doing, what did you expect, what happened instead, any error messages, browser or device if relevant.
support.bodyHint: Minimum 50 characters. Clear technical detail helps us respond faster.
support.submitSuccess: Your ticket was registered. We will follow up via your account email when there are updates.
support.submitError: Could not submit the ticket. Try again or contact support.
support.historyEmpty: You have not submitted any tickets through this channel yet.

categories.integration_error: Integration (payments, MIR or other technical connection)

rooms.title: Rooms/Apartments
rooms.description: Configure the names of your rooms or apartments. These names will appear on the dashboard and when creating new reservations.
rooms.limitReachedDescription: You've used all {max} rooms included in your current plan. To add more rooms, visit the Plan Upgrade page.
rooms.noteDescription: The names you configure here will appear throughout the system: dashboard, reservation creation, calendars, etc.
rooms.planLimitDescription: You can configure up to {max} rooms/apartments according to your current plan.

cleaning.icalLink: Calendar link (send this to your cleaner)
cleaning.regenerateConfirm: Are you sure? The previous link will stop working and the cleaner will need the new one.
cleaning.noRooms: Add rooms first to set up the cleaning calendar.
cleaning.icalInstructions: The cleaner just needs to open this link in Google Calendar (Add by URL) or paste it into any calendar app. It updates automatically with each reservation.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.calendarsSubtitle: Manage system calendars and sync with OTAs
integrations.planInfo: Current plan: You can manage up to {max} properties/rooms according to your plan. Each property automatically generates a unique iCal that you can use on Airbnb, Expedia and Booking.com. You can also add up to 5 additional external calendars per property to sync their reservations.
integrations.addFormDescription: Connect calendars from Airbnb, Expedia, Booking.com or other OTAs
integrations.systemCalendarsDesc: Each property automatically generates a unique iCal that you can use on your OTAs
integrations.noPropertiesHint: Create a property first in the Properties section
integrations.icalUrlLabel: System iCal URL to sync with OTAs:
integrations.copyHint: Copy this URL and use it on Airbnb, Expedia, Booking.com or other OTAs to sync your direct reservations.
integrations.externalCalendarsDesc: OTA calendars that sync with your system to block dates automatically
integrations.noExternalCalendarsHint: Add one to sync with OTAs
integrations.infoSystemCal: System Calendars: Each property automatically generates a unique iCal with all your direct reservations. Use this URL on your OTAs so they automatically block dates when you have direct reservations.
integrations.infoExternalCal: External Calendars: Add your OTAs' iCals (Airbnb, Expedia, Booking) so the system automatically blocks dates when you have reservations on those platforms.
integrations.infoSync: Sync: External calendars sync automatically according to the configured frequency. You can also sync manually at any time.
integrations.infoLimits: Limits: Your plan allows up to {max} properties/rooms. Each property can have one system calendar and up to 5 additional external calendars.
integrations.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this calendar?

billing.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? Your access will continue until the end of the current billing period.
billing.cancelSuccess: Subscription cancelled. Your access will continue until the end of the current period.

checkinInstructions.contentPlaceholder: E.g.: Door code, arrival instructions, parking, etc...
checkinInstructions.variablesHint: These variables are automatically replaced when the email is sent to the guest.

empresa.logoHint: Recommended formats: PNG, JPG, SVG. Max size: 2MB. Recommended dimensions: 200x100px
empresa.logoUrlHint: If you prefer to use a URL instead of uploading a file
empresa.saveHint: Complete the required fields (*) and click "Save Configuration" to save the data to the database.

mir.title: MIR Settings
mir.subtitle: Configure credentials for sending communications to the Ministry of the Interior
mir.configStatusDescription: Verify that all credentials are configured correctly
mir.credentialsDescription: Enter the credentials provided by the Ministry of the Interior
mir.userHint: Format: Tax ID + letter + WS (e.g.: example12345678TWS)
mir.codigoArrendadorHint: Unique code assigned by MIR for authentication
mir.moduleBannerReminder: Reminder: Automatic submission of guest forms to the Ministry of the Interior is mandatory in Spain.
mir.moduleBannerPrice: For just 8€/month (+ 21% VAT) you can have the MIR module active, which includes:
mir.moduleBannerItem2: Automatic form submission to the government
mir.moduleBannerItem4: No worries about fines or sanctions
mir.countryCardDescriptionPro: PRO Plan: You have access to all countries. The legal module will adapt automatically based on the traveller's country.
mir.countryCardDescriptionFree: FREE+LEGAL Plan: Select the country your legal module is configured for. You can only register travellers from this country.
mir.countryHint: You can only register travellers from this country. Upgrade to PRO to access all countries.
mir.planProInfo: PRO Plan: You have access to all countries. The legal module will adapt automatically based on the traveller's country for each registration.
mir.infoStep2: Check the "Web service communications submission" box
mir.infoStep3: Obtain your user (format: TaxID---WS), password and landlord code
mir.infoStep4: Configure these credentials in this form
mir.infoWarning: Important: Credentials are sensitive. Make sure they are configured correctly before using the system in production.

pricing.title: Dynamic Pricing

pricing.factorEvents: Events: Impact of local events (+3% per level)
pricing.factorOccupancy: Occupancy: Current demand for your rooms
pricing.factorLeadTime: Lead time: Adjustment based on booking days

marketIntelligence.title: Market Intelligence
marketIntelligence.subtitle: Holidays, local events and reservation analytics
marketIntelligence.addressPlaceholder: Address or place (e.g. Fuengirola, Calle Mayor 1 Madrid)
marketIntelligence.selectResult: Select a result for holidays and events in your area:
marketIntelligence.pricesNoteBody: Prices from nearby listings (Airbnb, Booking, etc.) require a data service like AirDNA or PriceLabs. Here you see your data, holidays and events to make pricing decisions.
marketIntelligence.holidaysClarification: National and regional (autonomous community) holidays. Local municipal holidays are not included.

pricesTab.title: Competitor prices by zone
pricesTab.description: Select a zone with data and a date range to see average and percentiles (P25, P40, P50, P75) of accommodation prices in that zone.
pricesTab.noZones: No zones with competitor data. Add competitors with a zone in Pricing to see averages by date.

marketIntelligence.addEventsHelp: Add fairs, festivals, concerts and events in your area to make better pricing decisions.
marketIntelligence.tip1: Raise prices 10-20% on national holidays and long weekends
marketIntelligence.tip2: Add important local events (fairs, concerts, sports) and adjust prices by impact level
marketIntelligence.tip3: Weekends with impact 4-5 events can justify 25-30% price increases
marketIntelligence.tip4: Review occupancy patterns by day of week to optimise minimum prices on slow days

supportAssistant.title: Delfín Check-in Assistant
supportAssistant.subtitle: Help with using the software (no private data)
supportAssistant.greeting: I'm the Delfín Check-in Assistant. I help you use the software (MIR, registrations, properties, and more). What would you like to do?
supportAssistant.hint: Tip: say which screen you're on and what you want to achieve (e.g. "Configure MIR").
supportAssistant.genericError: Couldn't answer right now. Please try again in a few seconds.
supportAssistant.rateLimited: Too many requests. Wait a few seconds and try again.
supportAssistant.usageWarning: You have few messages left this month.
supportAssistant.usageLimitReached: Monthly limit reached. It resets next month.
